turns.user_message: I've realized I'm just not good at keeping people close. It feels like I'm always the one who gets left behind.
I see now that this pattern has been going on for years. I'm the common factor in every connection that fades away.
I think I'm just built to end up alone. The thought of trying to connect again feels completely pointless.

generation_metadata.diversity_anchor: The speaker opens with a conclusion they've reached about themselves.
